description_long: This is a single-sized mattress with a quilted, diamond-patterned surface in a light gray color. The mattress is topped with a single white pillow positioned at one end, suggesting it is intended for individual use. The sides of the mattress feature a dark brown border, likely simulating a fabric or faux-leather trim, which provides a visual contrast to the lighter sleeping surface. The mattress rests on four short, black feet, elevating it slightly above the ground and giving it a modern, minimalistic appearance. The surface appears soft and padded, indicating comfort and support for sleeping. There are no visible stains, tags, or brand markings on the exterior, and the overall condition appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A single-sized, quilted gray mattress with a white pillow and dark brown edge trim, elevated on four black feet. The surface is clean, soft, and features a diamond pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the mattress, the white pillow on the left, and the dark brown border along the edge.
description_view_1: End view with the pillow at the far end, highlighting the width and the diamond-patterned surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pillow on the right, again showing the length and the continuous brown edge trim.
description_view_3: End view with the pillow closest to the viewer, emphasizing the mattress's width and the clean, quilted surface.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted diamond pattern evenly distributed across the entire sleeping surface.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous dark brown piping runs along the entire edge, moderately thick and visually distinct from the main surface.
